targets.rawSql:
;WITH unique_records AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Part Type],
        [Identical ID],
        [QC Member],
        [Year Record],
        [Month Record],
        [File Run No.],
        [Sequence],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.]))      AS cavity_clean,
        [ISC],
        [Judgement [S]]],
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Part Name]))      AS part_name,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Material No.]))    AS material_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([OI No.]))          AS oi_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Sample Part No.])) AS sample_part_no,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Lot Material]))   AS lot_material,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([Condition STD]))  AS condition_std,
        LTRIM(RTRIM([QC Member]))      AS qc_member_val
    FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
    WHERE
        [Part Type] = 'Injection'
        AND [Cavity No.] IS NOT NULL
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Cavity No.])) != ''
        AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Year Record]))
                IN ([[year:singlequote]])
        AND CAST([Month Record] AS VARCHAR(2))
                IN ([[month:singlequote]])
        AND (
            '[[mold_no]]' = 'All'
            OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN ([[mold_no:singlequote]])
        )
        AND (
            '[[mc_no]]' = 'All'
            OR LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) IN ([[mc_no:singlequote]])
        )
        AND (
            '[[part_no]]' = 'All'
            OR LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) IN ([[part_no:singlequote]])
        )
),
ng_lot_cavity AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        [Identical ID],
        cavity_clean,
        part_name,
        material_no,
        oi_no,
        sample_part_no,
        lot_material,
        condition_std,
        qc_member_val
    FROM unique_records
    WHERE [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'
),
-- ✅ DISTINCT แยกทีละ field ต่อ Cavity
-- ถ้าค่าเหมือนกัน → เหลือตัวเดียว
-- ถ้าค่าต่างกัน → คงทั้งหมด
d_part AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, part_name
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
d_material AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, material_no
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
d_oi AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, oi_no
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
d_sample AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, sample_part_no
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
d_lot AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, lot_material
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
d_cond AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, condition_std
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
d_qc AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT cavity_clean, qc_member_val
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
),
-- ✅ รวม STRING_AGG แยกทีละ field
agg_breakdown AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(part_name,      ' / ') AS part_name_agg
    FROM d_part GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
agg_material AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(material_no,    ' / ') AS material_no_agg
    FROM d_material GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
agg_oi AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(oi_no,          ' / ') AS oi_no_agg
    FROM d_oi GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
agg_sample AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(sample_part_no, ' / ') AS sample_part_no_agg
    FROM d_sample GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
agg_lot AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(lot_material,   ' / ') AS lot_material_agg
    FROM d_lot GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
agg_cond AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(condition_std,  ' / ') AS condition_std_agg
    FROM d_cond GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
agg_qc AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        STRING_AGG(qc_member_val,  ' / ') AS qc_member_agg
    FROM d_qc GROUP BY cavity_clean
),
-- ✅ นับ NG Count จาก ng_lot_cavity เหมือนเดิม
ng_count AS (
    SELECT
        cavity_clean,
        COUNT(DISTINCT [Identical ID]) AS ng_count
    FROM ng_lot_cavity
    GROUP BY cavity_clean
)
SELECT
    'Cavity ' + nc.cavity_clean    AS [Cavity],
    nc.ng_count                    AS [NG Count],
    ab.part_name_agg               AS [Part Name],
    am.material_no_agg             AS [Material No.],
    ao.oi_no_agg                   AS [OI No.],
    asa.sample_part_no_agg         AS [Sample Part No.],
    al.lot_material_agg            AS [Lot Material],
    ac.condition_std_agg           AS [Condition STD],
    aq.qc_member_agg               AS [QC Member]
FROM ng_count             AS nc
LEFT JOIN agg_breakdown   AS ab  ON ab.cavity_clean  = nc.cavity_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_material    AS am  ON am.cavity_clean  = nc.cavity_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_oi          AS ao  ON ao.cavity_clean  = nc.cavity_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_sample      AS asa ON asa.cavity_clean = nc.cavity_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_lot         AS al  ON al.cavity_clean  = nc.cavity_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_cond        AS ac  ON ac.cavity_clean  = nc.cavity_clean
LEFT JOIN agg_qc          AS aq  ON aq.cavity_clean  = nc.cavity_clean
ORDER BY
    CASE
        WHEN TRY_CAST(nc.cavity_clean AS INT) IS NOT NULL
        THEN TRY_CAST(nc.cavity_clean AS INT)
        ELSE 9999
    END ASC,
    nc.cavity_clean ASC

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR))) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY __value DESC
list.label: Year
list.name: year
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM(CAST([Year Record] AS VARCHAR))) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Year Record] IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY __value DESC

list.definition:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS __value      -- ✅ เลขดิบ ตรงกับที่ Main Query ต้องการ
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)
list.label: Month
list.name: month
list.query:
SELECT
    CASE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record]))
        WHEN '1'  THEN 'Jan' WHEN '2'  THEN 'Feb'
        WHEN '3'  THEN 'Mar' WHEN '4'  THEN 'Apr'
        WHEN '5'  THEN 'May' WHEN '6'  THEN 'Jun'
        WHEN '7'  THEN 'Jul' WHEN '8'  THEN 'Aug'
        WHEN '9'  THEN 'Sep' WHEN '10' THEN 'Oct'
        WHEN '11' THEN 'Nov' WHEN '12' THEN 'Dec'
    END AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS __value      -- ✅ เลขดิบ ตรงกับที่ Main Query ต้องการ
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) != ''
ORDER BY CAST(LTRIM(RTRIM([Month Record])) AS INT)

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'     -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Mold No.
list.name: mold_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [Mold No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'     -- ✅ เฉพาะ Mold ที่มี NG เท่านั้น
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: M/C No.
list.name: mc_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]
WHERE [M/C No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'    -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
ORDER BY __value

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]

WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'   -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote})          -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
list.label: Part No.
list.name: part_no
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __text,
    LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) AS __value
FROM [DigitalQC].[dbo].[InspectionRecord@Injection_Database]

WHERE [Part No.] IS NOT NULL
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Part No.])) != ''
  AND [Judgement [S]]] = 'X'   -- ✅ เฉพาะที่มี NG
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([Mold No.])) IN (${mold_no:singlequote})        -- ✅ กรองตาม Mold No.
  AND LTRIM(RTRIM([M/C No.]))  IN (${mc_no:singlequote})          -- ✅ กรองตาม M/C No.
ORDER BY __value
